title: Conduct field-based acceptance tests for construction materials
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct field-based acceptance tests for construction materials demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Prepare for field-based acceptance tests

pcs.text: Review job request to identify the test method and equipment involved, samples to be collected and/or test pieces to be prepared
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review job request to identify the test method and equipment involved, samples to be collected and/or test pieces to be prepared?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review job request to identify the test method and equipment involved, samples to be collected and/or test pieces to be prepared.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and workplace safe work procedures associated with the site, samples, test methods and equipment used
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and workplace safe work procedures associated with the site, samples, test methods and equipment used?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and workplace safe work procedures associated with the site, samples, test methods and equipment used.

pcs.text: Confirm site location, access, timing and any special test requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm site location, access, timing and any special test requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm site location, access, timing and any special test requirements.

pcs.text: Assemble all required equipment/materials and check that they are fit for purpose
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble all required equipment/materials and check that they are fit for purpose?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble all required equipment/materials and check that they are fit for purpose.

pcs.text: Stow equipment/materials to ensure their safe transport, as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stow equipment/materials to ensure their safe transport, as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stow equipment/materials to ensure their safe transport, as necessary.

pcs.text: Arrange transport to site, as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Arrange transport to site, as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Arrange transport to site, as necessary.

pcs.text: Liaise with appropriate personnel on arrival at site to ensure safety and minimise disruption to other workers during testing/sampling
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Liaise with appropriate personnel on arrival at site to ensure safety and minimise disruption to other workers during testing/sampling?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Liaise with appropriate personnel on arrival at site to ensure safety and minimise disruption to other workers during testing/sampling.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for field-based acceptance tests

elements.title: Perform field tests

pcs.text: Identify locations for in situ tests in accordance with test method or client instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify locations for in situ tests in accordance with test method or client instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify locations for in situ tests in accordance with test method or client instructions.

pcs.text: Set up, check and operate test equipment safely and in accordance with workplace procedures and test method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set up, check and operate test equipment safely and in accordance with workplace procedures and test method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set up, check and operate test equipment safely and in accordance with workplace procedures and test method.

pcs.text: Perform tests as specified in test method or workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform tests as specified in test method or workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform tests as specified in test method or workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Take sufficient test measurements to ensure reliable data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take sufficient test measurements to ensure reliable data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take sufficient test measurements to ensure reliable data.

pcs.text: Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and take appropriate corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and take appropriate corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise obvious errors or atypical data and take appropriate corrective actions.

pcs.text: Recognise and record details of site conditions that may impact on data quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and record details of site conditions that may impact on data quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and record details of site conditions that may impact on data quality.

pcs.text: Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond own technical competence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond own technical competence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice to deal with any situation beyond own technical competence.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Perform field tests

elements.title: Collect site samples and prepare test pieces

pcs.text: Identify locations for sample collection in accordance with test method or client instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify locations for sample collection in accordance with test method or client instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify locations for sample collection in accordance with test method or client instructions.

pcs.text: Seek advice if samples cannot be collected or if sampling procedures require modification
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek advice if samples cannot be collected or if sampling procedures require modification?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek advice if samples cannot be collected or if sampling procedures require modification.

pcs.text: Obtain required samples and maintain their integrity in accordance with sampling procedures or test method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain required samples and maintain their integrity in accordance with sampling procedures or test method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain required samples and maintain their integrity in accordance with sampling procedures or test method.

pcs.text: Label all samples to ensure their traceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Label all samples to ensure their traceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Label all samples to ensure their traceability.

pcs.text: Recognise and record any information about the sample appearance or site conditions that may impact on sample integrity
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise and record any information about the sample appearance or site conditions that may impact on sample integrity?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise and record any information about the sample appearance or site conditions that may impact on sample integrity.

pcs.text: Prepare required test pieces and organise their safe curing, storage and/or transport in accordance with test method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare required test pieces and organise their safe curing, storage and/or transport in accordance with test method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare required test pieces and organise their safe curing, storage and/or transport in accordance with test method.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Collect site samples and prepare test pieces

elements.title: Finalise field testing

pcs.text: Re-instate all disturbed surfaces in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Re-instate all disturbed surfaces in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Re-instate all disturbed surfaces in accordance with workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean all equipment (and vehicle as necessary) to avoid environmental damage, including stormwater run-off and/or transfer of pests
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean all equipment (and vehicle as necessary) to avoid environmental damage, including stormwater run-off and/or transfer of pests?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean all equipment (and vehicle as necessary) to avoid environmental damage, including stormwater run-off and/or transfer of pests.

pcs.text: Check that all equipment/materials are present and undamaged prior to re-stowing them for safe transport, as necessary
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check that all equipment/materials are present and undamaged prior to re-stowing them for safe transport, as necessary?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check that all equipment/materials are present and undamaged prior to re-stowing them for safe transport, as necessary.

pcs.text: Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of tests and prior to leaving site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of tests and prior to leaving site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify appropriate site personnel on completion of tests and prior to leaving site.

pcs.text: Check serviceability of test equipment on return to base, before storage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check serviceability of test equipment on return to base, before storage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check serviceability of test equipment on return to base, before storage.

pcs.text: Complete site safety plans, equipment logs and test reports in accordance with workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete site safety plans, equipment logs and test reports in accordance with workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete site safety plans, equipment logs and test reports in accordance with workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Finalise field testing

elements.title: Maintain a safe work environment

pcs.text: Use safe work procedures and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use safe work procedures and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use safe work procedures and personal protective equipment (PPE) to ensure personal safety and that of others.

pcs.text: Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Minimise environmental impacts of testing/sampling and generation of waste.

pcs.text: Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with environmental/quarantine requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with environmental/quarantine requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and/or dispose of all waste in accordance with environmental/quarantine requirements and workplace procedures.
